mapper.select: SELECT C.ROOM_ID AS roomId, C.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, C.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, C.BUYER_EMAIL AS buyerEmail, C.LAST_MESSAGE AS lastMessage, TO_CHAR(C.LAST_MESSAGE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS lastMessageAt, C.MUTE_YN AS muteYn, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, (SELECT IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_NO = C.PRODUCT_NO AND PI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS productImgUrl, CASE WHEN C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN C.BUYER_EMAIL ELSE C.SELLER_EMAIL END AS otherUserEmail FROM CHAT_ROOM C JOIN PRODUCTS P ON C.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO WHERE C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} OR C.BUYER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} ORDER BY C.LAST_MESSAGE_AT DESC NULLS LAST
